# gcore_cloud_inference_secrets (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_cloud_inference_secrets" "example_cloud_inference_secrets" {
  project_id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000
- `project_id` (Number) Project ID

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `data` (Attributes) Secret data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--data))
- `name` (String) Secret name.
- `type` (String) Secret type.

<a id="nestedatt--items--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.data`

Read-Only:

- `aws_access_key_id` (String) AWS IAM key ID.
- `aws_secret_access_key` (String) AWS IAM secret key.
